name: 天降器官嚇退惡人
description: 開場女主用法術讓天上下腎臟雨，嚇退想強取她器官的家人。荒誕的超現實畫面瞬間建立女主的強大和不可預測性。
tags: 恐怖與荒誕的結合、弱者瞬間變強者的視覺震撼

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Is this what you want?... Want them? Have them all... The sky. The sky. It's raining kidneys. So scared. And you still dare to ask for kidneys?
examples.context: 恐怖與荒誕的結合、弱者瞬間變強者的視覺震撼
